title: draba pulvinata subsp. pulvinata
intro: Draba pulvinata subsp. pulvinata, also known as the Alpine Whitlow Grass, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Draba pulvinata subsp. pulvinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
